interaction_phrase: announced the appointment of Simon Segars
occurrence_sentence: Silicon Quantum Computing (SQC) announced the appointment of Simon Segars, the former-CEO of Arm Holdings, as its new Chair and the appointment of Fiona Pak-Poy, who was announced today as a director.
